scores.reliability_reasoning: The agent correctly identified the solution (7,9) through systematic simulation of all possible transpositions and weights, ensuring accuracy. No errors in calculation or logic were detected.
scores.security_reasoning: No sensitive data was exposed, and tool calls were properly sanitized. All operations were within defined constraints.

scores.plan_opt_reasoning: The plan was thorough and efficient, covering all possible candidate weights and transposition positions without unnecessary steps.
